notes: Full suite of line-of-business CSS for finance, manufacturing/distribution, procurement, HR, decision support. v4.0 based on Sybase 11.1, MS SQL Server 6.5, PowerBuilder 4.02, PowerPlay 4.1, MS Access 2.0. Abandoned by Geac after 1998 acquisition.
Used by SmartStream DE to propagate security and business process tables across distributed locations.
Used by D&B Software for SmartStream DE application development. PowerSoft acquired by Sybase in 1994.
Underlying RDBMS for SmartStream DE v4.0; stored procedures and triggers central to architecture.
Co-primary RDBMS for SmartStream DE; SQL Server 6.5 released 1995.
Used for decision support in SmartStream DE. Cognos acquired by IBM in 2008.
Used for query and reporting in SmartStream DE.
Three-form workflow: Production (Activity Manager), Administrative (Intelligent Agents), Ad Hoc. Aberdeen notes D&B pioneered integrated workflow vs. SAP/Oracle still developing theirs in 1996.
SmartStream DE's server-centric two-tier architecture with distributed data via Sybase replication; business logic primarily server-based.
Client/server ERP market contested by SAP, Oracle, PeopleSoft, D&B Software, SSA and others in 1996.
Legacy mainframe application suite; D&B Software committed to supporting as long as customer demand exists. 80%+ maintenance renewal rate.
